substrate.value: Si(100) wafers, sapphire substrates, or gold-coated MEMS bridges

deviceProperties.deviceStructure: Capacitive shunt switch (gold bridge on sapphire substrate)

otherAspects.safety: ALD processes involve handling hazardous chemicals (e.g., trimethylaluminum, diethylzinc) and require proper ventilation and safety protocols.
